tasks.title: Add tests for task template commands
tasks.description: The ralph task template subcommands (list, show, build) have NO tests. Templates allow creating tasks from predefined structures. File: crates/ralph/src/cli/task/template.rs. Without tests, template bugs could create malformed tasks.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/cli/task/template.rs :: template CLI commands
analysis: Template CLI commands untested

tasks.title: Add edge case tests for invalid/corrupted queue files
tasks.description: Queue file error handling has NO tests for corruption scenarios. Untested scenarios: Malformed JSON in queue.json, Partial write recovery, Invalid task field types, Missing required fields, Duplicate task IDs. These edge cases could cause data loss.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/queue/file.rs :: queue file operations
path: crates/ralph/src/jsonc.rs :: JSONC parsing
analysis: No tests for corrupted/malformed queue file recovery

tasks.title: Add tests for context command
tasks.description: The ralph context command (init, update, validate subcommands) has NO tests. This command manages RepoPrompt context files for the agent. Files: crates/ralph/src/cli/context.rs, crates/ralph/src/commands/context/. Without tests, context management bugs could break RepoPrompt integration.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/cli/context.rs :: context CLI commands
analysis: No tests for context commands found

tasks.title: Add tests for watch command submodules
tasks.description: The watch command has 8 submodules (comments, debounce, event_loop, paths, processor, state, tasks, types) but test coverage is sparse. The command monitors files for TODO/FIXME comments and auto-creates tasks. Without tests, file watching bugs could miss important comments.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/commands/watch/mod.rs :: 100+ lines
analysis: 8 submodules, sparse test coverage
plan: Add tests for debounce.rs: debounce timing logic
Run `cargo test -p ralph --lib -- commands::watch` to verify

tasks.title: Add full task lifecycle integration test
tasks.description: There is NO integration test that covers the complete task lifecycle from creation to completion. The lifecycle includes: task build, task ready, task start, ralph run, task done/reject. Tests exist for individual steps but not the full flow. Without E2E lifecycle tests, integration bugs could go undetected.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/tests/task_cmd_test.rs :: task creation tests
path: crates/ralph/tests/task_done_completion_signal_test.rs :: completion tests
analysis: No test covers the full create -> start -> run -> done lifecycle
plan: Verify queue state at each step
Run `cargo test -p ralph --test task_lifecycle_test` to verify

tasks.title: Add SIGTERM signal handler to daemon serve
tasks.description: The daemon serve function does not register any signal handlers for SIGTERM. The only shutdown mechanism is via the stop signal file. If the daemon receives SIGTERM (e.g., from system shutdown or kill without -9), it won't clean up gracefully - the state file and lock will remain. Files: crates/ralph/src/commands/daemon/serve.rs.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/commands/daemon/serve.rs :: entire file :: no SIGTERM handler
analysis: On SIGTERM, daemon exits without cleanup, leaving state file and lock
plan: Add signal handler registration for SIGTERM in serve.rs
Use signal_hook or tokio::signal for cross-platform support
On SIGTERM, trigger graceful shutdown (clean state file, release lock)

tasks.title: Add tests for runner error classification functions
tasks.description: The runner/error.rs module has only 2 tests (redaction and context), but the classify() method and helper functions like looks_like_rate_limit(), looks_like_temporary_unavailable(), looks_like_auth_required() have NO unit tests. Retry logic depends entirely on correct classification.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/runner/error.rs :: lines 121-150 :: pattern matching functions untested
analysis: None of these pattern matching functions have test coverage
plan: Run `cargo test -p ralph --lib -- runner::error` to verify

tasks.title: Add overflow protection to backoff computation
tasks.description: The compute_backoff function in runutil/retry.rs has no overflow protection when base_backoff * multiplier^retry_index exceeds Duration::MAX. No validation that multiplier is >= 1.0.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/runutil/retry.rs :: lines 140-150 :: compute_backoff function
analysis: No overflow protection, no validation multiplier >= 1.0
plan: Add overflow check: cap backoff at Duration::MAX
Run `cargo test -p ralph --lib -- runutil::retry` to verify

tasks.title: Add validation for status transition rules in set_status
tasks.description: The set_status function does NOT validate status transition rules. However, promote_draft_to_todo explicitly validates that the task is in Draft status before promoting. This creates an inconsistency where the promotion path has guards but the general path does not.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/queue/operations/status.rs :: lines 214-242 :: promote_draft_to_todo validates task status
path: crates/ralph/src/queue/operations/status.rs :: set_status :: no validation for status transition rules

tasks.title: Add runtime validation for config queue thresholds
tasks.description: Schema defines ranges for queue thresholds but these are NOT validated in validate_config() or validate_queue_overrides(). Missing validation for: size_warning_threshold_kb, task_count_warning_threshold, max_dependency_depth, auto_archive_terminal_after_days.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/contracts/config/queue.rs :: schemars annotations define ranges
path: crates/ralph/src/config/validation.rs :: no runtime validation for these fields
plan: Validate each threshold within schema-defined ranges

tasks.title: Fix unused in_header variable in extract_content_from_exported
tasks.description: The in_header variable in prompts_internal/management.rs is set to true and never changed, making the conditional meaningless. Dead code indicates incomplete implementation.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/prompts_internal/management.rs :: line 348 :: let in_header = true; // never mutated
plan: Remove variable or implement proper header tracking
Add test for header extraction edge cases

tasks.title: Fix inconsistent task_id validation across prompt render functions
tasks.description: Task ID validation is inconsistent: render_worker_phase1_prompt validates empty task_id; render_worker_single_phase_prompt validates empty task_id; but render_worker_phase2_prompt, render_worker_phase2_handoff_prompt, render_worker_phase3_prompt do NOT validate task_id.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/prompts_internal/worker_phases.rs :: phase1/phase3/single validate, phase2 variants don't
plan: Add empty task_id validation to all phase2 render functions
Add tests for each render function with empty task_id

tasks.title: Add Ctrl-C check during backoff sleep in retry logic
tasks.description: The Ctrl-C check in runutil/execution.rs happens AFTER the sleep completes, not during it. If Ctrl-C is pressed during sleep, the code waits for the full backoff duration before checking.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/runutil/execution.rs :: lines 410-420 :: Ctrl-C check after sleep
plan: Check Ctrl-C at shorter intervals during backoff
Add test for quick Ctrl-C response

tasks.title: Add tests for JSON parsing edge cases in streaming
tasks.description: The parse_json_line function silently discards malformed lines without error. The fallback parsing only looks for { which would miss JSON arrays starting with [.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/runner/execution/json.rs :: lines 5-24 :: no distinction between empty and malformed
plan: Add tests for empty, valid object, valid array, malformed cases
Consider logging when malformed JSON is discarded

tasks.title: Fix deny_unknown_fields blocking migration of deprecated config keys
tasks.description: ConfigLayer uses deny_unknown_fields which means if a user has a config with a deprecated field, the config will fail to parse BEFORE migrations can run. The migration system cannot help because parsing fails first.
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/config/layer.rs :: line 30 :: deny_unknown_fields
analysis: Users must manually remove deprecated fields before upgrading
plan: Evaluate impact: list deprecated config keys
Option 2: Run migrations before full config parsing
Add test for deprecated key migration

tasks.title: Fix Makefile test target race condition
tasks.description: The `make test` target has a race condition where cleanup runs before the error handler can cat the log file. The `trap cleanup EXIT` causes cleanup to run before error branch's cat, removing the log file.
evidence: path: Makefile :: lines 63-96 :: test target with trap cleanup EXIT
command: make macos-ci :: cat: .../unit-tests.log: No such file or directory
plan: Refactor to capture log content before cleanup
Option 1: Read log into variable before exit
Option 2: Use separate trap for ERR vs EXIT

custom_fields.stale_makefile_context: RQ-0942 centralized env reset in Makefile; test target now uses $(RALPH_ENV_RESET) and evidence line ranges should be refreshed before implementing this task.
